name: mcp
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) gateway. Enables external MCP servers as sandbox modules. Configure servers in ~/.hyperagent/config.json.

hints.overview: Gateway plugin for MCP server integration. Enable this plugin to unlock /mcp commands and connect external tool servers.
criticalRules: Enable this plugin FIRST, then use /mcp list to discover configured servers
Each MCP server must be individually approved before use
MCP servers run as full OS processes — NOT sandboxed
commonPatterns: 4. import { list_issues } from 'host:mcp-github' in handler code
